title: Square Yards is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Square Yards is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Square Yards in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Square Yards:
Square Yards is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Square Yards!
